whisper.test: Boss, I'm on duty. This is a test whisper — click to open the panel.
whisper.intro_format: Welcome aboard, Boss! I'm {0} — I'll keep you posted. Click my portrait to open the help panel.
whisper.auto_done_format: Done in the background: {0}. Click for details in the panel.

rule.ob_track: Boss, the depot has no tracks yet. Click — I'll show you how to lay them.
rule.ob_vehicle: Tracks ready. Time for the first vehicle — I'll show you where to buy.
rule.ob_deliver: The vehicle is on its way to the depot — track the delivery in the Fleet tab.
rule.ob_timetable: We have rolling stock — let's build the first timetable. Click, I'll guide you.
rule.ob_circulation: The timetable is in. I can chain it into a circulation for you — click.
rule.ob_crew: No driver yet — nothing moves without a crew. I'll show you recruitment.
rule.emu_trap: Heads up, Boss: we own an electric vehicle but the depot tracks have no catenary — it can't leave. Electrify or plan B.
rule.crew_missing: Circulations are set but crews have no schedules — I can build rosters. Click.
rule.broken_down: Boss, we have broken or overdue rolling stock. I can send it to the workshop — click.
rule.vehicle_idle: Some vehicles sit idle with no circulation assigned. Shall we put them to work? Click.
rule.orphan_timetable: Some timetables belong to no circulation — nobody will run them. I can chain them.
rule.line_unprofitable: One of the lines has been losing money for days. Let's look at the finances.
rule.no_desk: Some staff have no workstation — let's place the missing desks.
rule.bored: Everything runs like clockwork, Boss. Time for a new line? Click — I'll do the math.

stuck.offer_help: Boss, this looks like a struggle — I can prepare it for you. Click here.

plan.nothing: Nothing to propose at the moment, Boss.

circulation_autogen.effect: I'll chain free timetables into circulations and assign the best available vehicles.

crew_autogen.effect: I'll build crew rosters for today's runs (breaks and work limits per settings).

workshop.effect: I'll reserve service slots and send the vehicles for inspection (moving along depot tracks).
workshop.no_slot_format: {0} {1}: no free slot for {2} (consider external works)

maintenance.workshop: Send rolling stock to the workshop

reject.composition_unsupported: loco+cars — assemble manually (planner picks multiple units)
reject.range: fuel range too short (return to refuel)

ui.title: Connection planner
ui.not_ready: The map is still loading, Boss — try again in a moment.
ui.no_candidates: No vehicle in the fleet can serve this relation — reasons below.
ui.created_format: Created timetable "{0}", Boss. I'll remind you to chain it into a circulation.
ui.create_failed: Could not create the timetable (graph/category) — see log.

guidance.fallback: I'll walk you through it once the module provides the steps.

circulation_autogen.step1: Open the circulation list — the Circulations tab next to timetables.
circulation_autogen.step2: Use [Auto-generate] or drag timetables into a circulation manually.

depot_buildtrack.step1: Click the BUILD tab in the left bar.
depot_buildtrack.step2: Pick the TRACK tool and lay track from an existing point.

fleet_buy.warn_no_catenary: Before you buy: the depot has no catenary — an electric vehicle won't leave. Consider diesel or electrify first.
fleet_buy.step1: Open the FLEET tab in the left bar.
fleet_buy.step2: In the Market tab pick a vehicle and add it to the cart.

fleet_deliver.step1: The vehicle is heading to the depot — see delivery status in FLEET → My fleet.

timetable_create.step1: Opening the connection planner — pick where you want to run.
timetable_create.step2: Prefer manual? SCHEDULES tab → New timetable.

personnel_hire.step1: Open the STAFF tab in the left bar.
personnel_hire.step2: In the Recruitment tab hire a driver.

crew_autogen.step2: Use the roster Auto-generator (settings + preview before commit).

maintenance_workshop.step1: Opening the Workshops panel — here you see slots and the inspection queue.
maintenance_workshop.step2: Pick a vehicle and a slot (inspection level must match). No room? Consider external works in the External tab.

economy_review.step1: Opening Finances — the per-line section shows which one loses money.
economy_review.step2: Consider: a different interval, another commercial category, a regional subsidy, or suspending the circulation.

depot_placedesk.step1: Click the BUILD tab in the left bar.
depot_placedesk.step2: In the room tool select a room and place a desk under "Available actions" — the employee will claim it.

_meta._comment: Minimal seed for M13-3 testing (Settings UI). Full rollout in M13-4.

configurator.empty_select_prompt: Select a model from the list on the left

form.header_select_prompt: Select a category from the list or click [+ New]

status.fill_form: Fill in fields and click Save
status.id_invalid_chars: ID may only contain letters, digits and underscore

list.title: TIMETABLES
list.empty: No timetables. Click [+ New] to create the first.
list.column_header: Nr     Route                          Cat.R Cat.C Start  End     Run   Stop   Stk.  Vm     Status     Actions

pool.empty:
All schedules are already in circulations.
Create new ones in the 'Timetables' tab.

auto_gen_settings.title: Auto-generation settings
auto_gen_settings.respect_composition: Respect rolling stock type (EMU/DMU vs Loco+Cars)
auto_gen_settings.respect_class: Respect service class (don't mix local with express)
auto_gen_settings.no_unassigned: No active schedules unassigned to any circulation
auto_gen_settings.no_selection_flash: Select at least one schedule in auto-gen settings

auto_gen_preview.title: Auto-generation preview
auto_gen_preview.summary_format: {0} circulations will be created. Vehicles auto-assigned: {1}/{0}.

deadhead.title: Stations don't connect

empty.no_active_dates: No active dates — set calendar in circulation options
empty.no_matching_vehicles: No vehicles matching the schedules in this circulation.
empty.no_fleet: No vehicles in fleet. Buy rolling stock in the 'Fleet' tab.

status.drag_hint: Drag vehicles from the right onto days on the left

train_number_status.no_free_for_category: No free numbers for this category

stops.track_warning_format: Track {0} at {1} extends route {2}x — may be unsuitable for direction

history.empty: (no closed days yet — first one rolls over at midnight)

slots.no_halls_hint:
<size=12>To build a workshop:
• Build a hall (min. 100 m²) in Build mode
• The bigger the hall, the higher the level (P1-P5)</size>

external.picker_no_workshops: No workshops support this level + type combination.

dispatch.info_format: Vehicle: {0} Component: {1} Self-repair failed — rescue locomotive required.
dispatch.no_candidates: No free locomotives — auto-dispatch impossible. Buy or free up a locomotive.

popup_station.halt_activation_hint: [TBD] Halt activation for a fee (→ M6 Economy)

popup_couple.warn_circulation: ⚠ Consist is in an active circulation — composition will change

popup_decouple.title: Choose split point
popup_decouple.hint: Click a split point between vehicles

popup_track.title: Track / line

confirm.main_menu_msg:
Save progress before returning
to the main menu?
confirm.exit_msg:
Save progress before
exiting the game?

save_load.newer_version: Save is from a newer game version — cannot load.
save_load.partial_load_msg: Save corrupted in modules: {0}. Defaults applied.
save_load.modified_save_msg: This save file was manually modified (HMAC mismatch). Loading it may cause errors or progress loss. Load anyway?

tips.tip1: Press F5 to quick-save anytime. F9 loads the last quick-save.
tips.tip2: You can change language in Settings → Language. Available: PL, EN, DE, CZ, JP.
tips.tip3: Each vehicle circulation can be edited from the Circulations tab.
tips.tip4: Vehicle technical condition drops with every kilometer. Don't forget inspections!
tips.tip5: Commercial timetable categories affect ticket price and IRJ classification.
tips.tip6: While paused (Space) you can calmly plan your next move.
tips.tip7: Auto-save runs every 5 minutes of game time. Your progress is safe.

recruit.info:
Recruitment is a separate fullscreen panel.

Click below to open the candidate market.

panel.empty: No candidates. Market refreshes every 7 game days.

posting_modal.title: New job posting
posting_modal.info:
Active posting for 14 game days increases 3× chance
of candidates of that role appearing at market refresh.

turnuses.title: Crew shifts (M8-8)
turnuses.footer: Full management (editor, validator, multi-day, hotels) in separate panel.

status.critical_no_workers: NO CONTROLLER — DepotMovementSim on FCFS (70% efficiency)

traffic.header_format: Traffic control (depot movement) — {1} Controllers: {2} | Capacity: {3} moves | Active: {4} | Pending: {5}
traffic.no_controllers: No traffic controllers. D35: for 24/7 control room minimum 3 people (one per shift Morning/Afternoon/Night). DepotMovementSim runs default FCFS + random ±20% delay (no priorities).
traffic.info_box: D28: Without controller — DepotMovementSim runs FCFS (70% efficiency, no priority). D35: Control room must be staffed 24/7 (min 3 controllers, one per shift). M8-11 MVP: provider infrastructure ready, full sort integration in M9b polish.

office.market_format: Job market refresh cycle: {0} days (base {1}d - office workers × 1d)
office.no_research: No active research. Choose a path below.

kasy.bonus_format: Revenue bonus per station: +{0}% (D19: clerk only in station popup, no 3D spawn)
kasy.empty: No assignments. Click 'Auto-assign' or assign manually in station popups (M9a polish).

workshops.no_slots: Workshops No workshop slots in depot. Build a workshop hall (M7-4) to assign mechanics.
workshops.header_format: Workshops — mechanic assignment (M8-12) Slots: {0} | Mechanics: {1} active | Assigned: {2}, Free: {3}

dispatch.header_format: Dispatch — {1} Active: {2} | Capacity: {3} employees | Handles: {4} (excl. dispatchers) | Pending: {5}
dispatch.no_dispatchers: No dispatchers hired. Hire 1-3 dispatchers (Recruitment panel) to enable auto-actions on sick leave / ad-hoc. D35: for 24/7 depot coverage min 3 people (one per shift Morning/Afternoon/Night).

hotel.title: Hotel booking (Overnight)
hotel.info_format: Company default tier (see Settings): {0}. D36: regional price multipliers post-EA.

toast.retirement_announced_format: {0} ({1}, age {2}) announces retirement. Will leave {3} (30 days notice).

warn.no_dispatcher: No dispatcher — hire one or click Manual

crew_editor.no_duties: No duties. Add the first one on the right.

form.title: Add duty

crew_autogen.title: Crew shift auto-generator (M8-9)
crew_autogen.preview_no_input:
<color=#F87171>No TrainRuns on input.

Enable 'Use fake timetable' in M8-9 — adapter to M5 in M8-11.</color>

settings.title: Parameters:
settings.info: M8-9 prototype: Pool TrainRun = fake debug timetable. Adapter to M5 Circulation in M8-11.

qualifications.disclaimer: Early Access: employees do not require any qualifications. In the full version each locomotive and train category will require specific permits (earned through training).

cancel_confirm.title: Cancel new game?
cancel_confirm.body: You'll lose all selected settings (difficulty, modifiers, rules). This operation doesn't save the configuration state.

status.empty: No saves. Start a new game.

body.railway_manager:
Strategy game about managing a railway network and depot.
Plan routes, manage your fleet, and expand infrastructure.
body.copyright: © 2026 Railway Manager Team. All rights reserved.
body.openstreetmap: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors, available under the Open Database License (ODbL) 1.0.

mods.title: Mods
mods.empty:
No mods installed.
Place mod folders in the Mods directory next to the game executable.

intro.title: One place for local add-ons and Steam Workshop.
intro.body: When the mod loader is ready, you'll see a list of active add-ons here, their versions, and quick access to management.

empty_state.hint: You can already open the local Mods folder or visit the Workshop page from the bottom bar.

navigation.body:
RMB + drag — rotate camera
Scroll — zoom
Middle mouse button + drag — pan view

build_modes.body:
Toolbar at the bottom of the screen lets you switch modes:
• Track — build track segments and turnouts
• Catenary — add overhead electric lines
• Wall / Door / Window — depot building elements

train_management.body:
Click a train in Select mode to see its technical condition, cleanliness, and route.
The train list is available on the left side of the screen.

keybindings.body:
[Esc] — close popup / return to menu
[Space] — pause / resume time
[1] [2] [3] — simulation speed ×1 / ×2 / ×3
[Del] — demolish selected element

save_load.body:
The game autosaves every few minutes.
Manual save is available from the pause menu.
Saves can be loaded from the main menu → Load.

assistant.info: Applies to the current game, takes effect immediately (no Apply needed). Skipping silences only the starter path — the advisor and delegation keep working.

info.key_rebind_restart: Some key changes may require scene restart to take effect in active systems.
info.rebind_coming: Key rebinding — coming in a future update
info.audio_mixer_pending: Audio mixer hookup will arrive in M12 Polish update.
info.i18n_partial: Full localization framework arrives in M13-3 (i18n).
info.language_autodetect: Default language = autodetect from Steam settings (if active) or operating system.
info.color_blind_pending: Full color-blind mode rollout planned post-EA.
info.ui_scale_pending: UI scale: 100% — more options arriving in 1.0.

preset_desc.easy: More starting cash, fewer breakdowns, generous subsidies. For beginners or learning the systems.
preset_desc.normal: Balanced values — default mode. Recommended for first run.
preset_desc.hard: Less cash, more breakdowns, sharper costs. For experienced operators.
preset_desc.realistic: Real market conditions simulation. Old fleet breaks down, subsidies require effort, passengers picky.

difficulty.info_locked: Difficulty is chosen once at new game start — it cannot be changed mid-game.

tooltip.start_budget: Starting company cash. Base value = 150 000 PLN. Higher gives more buffer for early investments.
tooltip.operational_cost: Daily operational cost multiplier: fuel, traction energy, infrastructure fees, service costs.
tooltip.breakdown_chance: Vehicle breakdown probability (M7 BreakdownService). 0.0 = soft-off, breakdowns never happen. Works together with 'Vehicle breakdowns' rule.
tooltip.passenger_demand: Multiplier for passengers waiting at platforms (M6). Higher = more ticket revenue but also more pressure.
tooltip.salary: All employees salary multiplier (M8). Lower = lower fixed company costs.
tooltip.subsidy: Voivodeship subsidies multiplier for providing public services. 0.0 = soft-off (no subsidies).
tooltip.delay_propagation: How much delays cascade through the network (M9). 0.0 = each train independent, 2.5 = realistic domino effect.
tooltip.event_frequency: Random events frequency: weather, catenary failures, strikes (M12d). 0.0 = soft-off.
tooltip.hotel_cost: Hotel costs multiplier for employees on multi-day shifts (M8).
tooltip.ticket_price_tolerance: Passenger tolerance for higher ticket prices (M6.5). Higher = they can accept higher prices without dropping demand.

game_rules.info_locked: Rules are chosen once at new game start — they cannot be changed mid-game.

rule_desc.vehicle_breakdowns: Enables breakdown system (M7). Disable for casual mode without maintenance.
rule_desc.assistant_proactivity: The assistant suggests next steps on its own and reacts when you get stuck. Off = speaks only on request (panel always works).
rule_desc.random_events: Weather, catenary failures, personnel strikes, infrastructure delays.
rule_desc.voivodeship_subsidies: Income from voivodeship subsidies. Disable for hard mode (earn everything from tickets).

tooltip.vehicle_breakdowns: Activates breakdown system (M7). Disable for casual mode without maintenance gameplay.
tooltip.assistant_proactivity: Onboarding + proactive advisor hints. Disabled: the assistant stays quiet until asked — delegating tasks via the panel always works. Default on for Easy/Normal, off for Hard/Realistic.
tooltip.random_events: Weather, catenary failures, personnel strikes, infrastructure events. Off = never happen.
tooltip.voivodeship_subsidies: Voivodeship subsidies income. Off = no subsidies, hard-mode (must earn everything from tickets).
tooltip.maintenance_decay: Per-km component degradation (M7). Off = all components always 100%. Combine with 'Vehicle breakdowns'=Off for full casual mode.
tooltip.employee_morale: Morale affects productivity (M8). Off = productivity always 100%. Employees never strike or quit on their own.
tooltip.weather_impact: Weather increases breakdown chance and delay propagation. Off = weather neutral (no 'freezing rain +30% breakdowns' events).
